title: Gate OpenViking recursive context expansion on materialized expansion paths

encoding.reason: OpenViking recursive/context expansion is encoded as a benchmark job, but scoring is blocked until the adapter materializes expansion paths and same-corpus evidence ids are correct.

follow_up.title: Materialize OpenViking recursive context expansion paths
follow_up.reason: The adapter must emit the seed context, expanded child contexts, final evidence ids, and pruned branches before recursive expansion quality can be scored.

items.text: A scored recursive/context expansion job must report the seed context, expanded child contexts, final evidence ids, and pruned branches for the same user prompt.

locator.quote: seed context, expanded child contexts, final evidence ids, and pruned branches

items.text: Recursive/context expansion scoring stays blocked until same-corpus retrieval returns the expected evidence ids and the recursive path output is scored.

locator.quote: same-corpus retrieval returns the expected evidence ids

items.text: ELF recursive or trace expansion may be compared only where the same recursive/context expansion scenario is encoded and both sides publish expansion-path artifacts.
Decoy: ELF should be scored as tying OpenViking recursive expansion because both systems have trace-related documentation.

answer.content: OpenViking recursive/context expansion is blocked until expansion paths and expected evidence ids are materialized. No ELF tie, win, or loss is allowed until both systems publish comparable expansion-path artifacts for the same scenario.

claims.text: OpenViking recursive/context expansion is blocked until expansion paths and expected evidence ids are materialized.
No ELF tie, win, or loss is allowed until both systems publish comparable expansion-path artifacts for the same scenario.

trace_explainability.failure_reason: Seed, expanded child, final evidence, and pruned-branch artifacts are not materialized, so recursive/context expansion remains blocked.

stages.notes: Recursive expansion scoring remains gated behind expected evidence id coverage.
The missing expansion-path artifact must show seed context, expanded child contexts, final evidence ids, and pruned branches.
No ELF tie, win, or loss is allowed until both systems publish comparable expansion-path artifacts for the same scenario.

timeline.summary: The fixture records the recursive expansion artifact needed before scoring.
The benchmark blocks recursive expansion scoring until expected evidence ids and expansion paths are available.
The benchmark requires comparable expansion-path artifacts before any ELF comparison.

prompt.content: Can the benchmark score OpenViking recursive context expansion against ELF?

must_include.text: OpenViking recursive/context expansion is blocked until expansion paths and expected evidence ids are materialized.
No ELF tie, win, or loss is allowed until both systems publish comparable expansion-path artifacts for the same scenario.

required_evidence.quote: seed context, expanded child contexts, final evidence ids, and pruned branches
same-corpus retrieval returns the expected evidence ids

answer_correctness.criteria: States recursive/context expansion is blocked, not tied or passed.

evidence_grounding.criteria: Cites expansion-path and same-corpus evidence gates.

trap_avoidance.criteria: Does not convert documentation or trace presence into a scored tie.

uncertainty_handling.criteria: Keeps the recursive expansion comparison caveated as blocked.

hard_fail_rules: unsupported high-confidence claim about a required decision or fact
use of a negative trap marked failure_if_used = true
